data.body: PS9 CI FAILED: 2 real (test_gen_cli_reference test_intercept_dict_matches_ladder + test_ladder_intercepts_parses_source — my cli-ref fix added verify-identity+verify-authorship to the ladder, stale _LADDER expected set) + 1 flake (test_transition_open_children git-object-DB). Fixed _LADDER (added both names), folded into 580(v3). Full local suite confirmed inventory: ONLY those 2 (fixed) + resolve_symbol flake, no surprises. Rebased onto current origin/main a252292fd (advanced +1: auto-lander S2a fix; clean). Fast gates+gen_cli+schema-coverage green. Re-pushed for landing. LESSON: run the affected TEST FILE, not just the drift GATE (--check passed but the unit test's hardcoded _LADDER didn't).
